articles.title: Deere Gets Lift From Construction as Farmers Still Struggle

articles.title: Repeat After Me, Stocks Are Not an Effective Inflation Hedge
articles.summary: Surveys indicate that investors are piling into stocks even as they see rising inflation. That’s likely to backfire as equities aren’t the hedge against price growth they are often taken to be.
